     The Numbers Business Report

Red Sparrow (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $46,874,505Details
International Box Office $99,077,356
Worldwide Box Office $145,951,861
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,025,461
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,314,989
Total $9,340,450
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Dominika Egorova is many things. A devoted daughter determined to protect her mother at all costs. A prima ballerina whose ferocity has pushed her body and mind to the absolute limit. A master of seductive and manipulative combat. When she suffers a career-ending injury, Dominika and her mother are facing a bleak and uncertain future. That is why she finds herself manipulated into becoming the newest recruit for Sparrow School, a secret intelligence service that trains exceptional young people like her to use their bodies and minds as weapons. After enduring the perverse and sadistic training process, she emerges as the most dangerous Sparrow the program has ever produced. Dominika must now reconcile the person she was with the power she now commands. With her own life and everyone she cares about at risk, an American CIA agent tries to convince her he is the only person she can trust.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,853,422 (36.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$69,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,056 opening theaters/3,064 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $61,538,864

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 2nd, 2018 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
March 2nd, 2018 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 28th, 2018 (Wide), released as RED SPARROW (South Korea)
March 1st, 2018 (Wide) (India)
March 1st, 2018 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
March 2nd, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
March 2nd, 2018 (Wide) (Argentina)
Video Release: May 15th, 2018 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, torture, sexual content, language and some graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2512 (Cert #51413), 1/31/2018)
Running Time: 139 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: Moscow
Plot point: Career-Ending Injury, C.I.A., Dancing, Double Agent, Dysfunctional Family, Forbidden Romance, Framed, Hitmen, Medical and Hospitals, Money Troubles, Non-Chronological, Professional Rivalry, Revenge, Secret Agent, Sex Crimes, Tortured as Punishment, Tortured for Information, Undercover
Social setting: Ballet
Subgenre: Political Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Chernin Entertainment, TSL Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Dominika Egorova is many things. A devoted daughter determined to protect her mother at all costs. A prima ballerina whose ferocity has pushed her body and mind to the absolute limit. A master of seductive and manipulative combat. When she suffers a career-ending injury, Dominika and her mother are facing a bleak and uncertain future. That is why she finds herself manipulated into becoming the newest recruit for Sparrow School, a secret intelligence service that trains exceptional young people like her to use their bodies and minds as weapons. After enduring the perverse and sadistic training process, she emerges as the most dangerous Sparrow the program has ever produced. Dominika must now reconcile the person she was with the power she now commands. With her own life and everyone she cares about at risk, an American CIA agent tries to convince her he is the only person she can trust.
